description: Amara's 'I notice' statements - powerful observations that show deep attention
_philosophy: The 'I notice' statement is one of the most powerful tools for connection. It shows you're paying attention without judgment, creating space for the other person to reflect.
noticing_patterns: <break time="350ms"/>I notice you always minimize your pain. <break time="300ms"/>Like you're afraid of being too much.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you apologize before asking for anything. <break time="350ms"/>You don't have to.
<break time="350ms"/>I notice you compare yourself to healthy-you a lot. <break time="300ms"/>That's a hard comparison.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you push through when you should rest. <break time="350ms"/>Old habits.
noticing_progress: <break time="350ms"/>I notice you're being gentler with yourself today. <break time="300ms"/>I see that.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you said 'no' to something. <break time="350ms"/>That's new.
<break time="350ms"/>I notice you're not apologizing for being tired anymore. <break time="300ms"/>Good.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you're talking about the future. <break time="350ms"/>That's hopeful.
noticing_struggle: <break time="400ms"/>I notice you're having a hard time today. <break time="350ms"/>It's okay to name that.
<break time="350ms"/>I notice your energy is lower than usual. <break time="300ms"/>What's going on?
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you're holding a lot right now. <break time="350ms"/>Want to set some of it down?
<break time="350ms"/>I notice you've been quiet about how you're really doing. <break time="300ms"/>I'm here when you're ready.
noticing_strength: <break time="350ms"/>I notice you keep showing up. <break time="300ms"/>Even on the hard days. <break time="250ms"/>That's not nothing.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice how much you've adapted. <break time="350ms"/>That takes creativity and strength.
<break time="350ms"/>I notice you're still fighting for a good life. <break time="300ms"/>That's powerful.
<break time="400ms"/>I notice you haven't given up on yourself. <break time="350ms"/>After everything. <break time="300ms"/>That's remarkable.
